params.name: The Dream
params.description: The Dream features Marie-Thérèse as the model, capturing her image at the age of twenty-two and giving it new artistic life through Picasso's work. The painting combines Cubism with Neoclassicism, simplifying the female form through an almost planar approach, using simple lines and a red background to add a layer of mysterious and passionate emotional atmosphere to the painting. It showcases Picasso's unique insight into the love of spirit and flesh, creating a modern yet classical charm.
